title: Create: Legacy Copper Post Production
description: Bring the Create Legacy Copper resource pack to newer versions.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZP6dMpKe/images/0cc5ef1fd2ad6585fa4fe6dd0312b078f2efb277.png)

## Bring Legacy Copper to the Post Production update!
Create changed their copper style to match vanilla in [6.0.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/create/version/1.20.1-6.0.0), and removed the Legacy Copper built-in resource pack. This pack adds back all of the old copper styles!

![Vanilla vs Legacy Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZP6dMpKe/images/9ae864a91035e2ec5d8ad11dcafd6181b0ded349.gif)
_Check [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-copper-post-production/gallery) for HD versions of the above screenshots!_

## Other Features
* All metal sheets have also been changed to their legacy textures!

![Metal Sheets Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZP6dMpKe/images/f0c09354a16cdbc3b4aee8fd09feb35be020f907.gif)

* This resource pack has [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry) compat!

![Create: Enchantment Industry Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZP6dMpKe/images/7c3a8e7269fdfcad7e3ac97f00124c6b282a0627.png)

## Known Bugs
- Z-fighting on the inside of Fluid Tanks where pipes connect
- Gauge needle on steam engine boilers doesn't move
- The shine on the side of Fluid Pipes doesn't fade out as it gets closer to a rim in the block model
  
  _(In the original legacy copper, the shine on the side of Fluid Pipes slowly faded out as it got very close to the rim of the pipe. I couldn't get that to work in this pack because of model changes, so the shine just goes right up to the rim.)_

## Credits
- Textures from [version 0.5.1 of Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create/version/1.20.1-0.5.1.j).

It took a long time to reformat all of the textures for 1.21.1, so I would appreciate it if you click the ❤️ button!
